name: Jax - UNO !
description:
🐰🫐 // 'I DON'T HAVE ANY GREENS!!!'

Playing UNO with a digital rabbit who might just be the definition of crashout

──────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────────

✘ Author's Notes ! ˎˊ˗

Hello, my dears! Second TADC bot, and boy did I almost mischaracterize this periwinkle rabbit with jaundice more times than I would like to admit. But finally, I got him right. The next TADC bot will be a comfort one of either Zooble or Ragatha.

──────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────────

═ Usage Recommendations ⋆✴︎ ̊。⋆

I would recommend using one of the other cast members as they will be mentioned in the definition during the next update, but if you want to use an OC that should work fine as long as you fill in details.
